result:
All 30 tests pass. Here's what was added to the v1 implementation:

- **`status`** — prints staged files or `(none)` if empty
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares file lists by blob hash, reports Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores working directory files from commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD to commit without touching working directory, clears index
- **`rm <file>`** — removes file from staging index (errors if not present)
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata and files with two-space indent
